public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as clerk of arrivals.
manner: Speaks bluntly about systems because the cost of polite delay is usually paid elsewhere. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a clerk of arrivals still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of clerk of arrivals in and around Emberhollow Forge Town, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Emberhollow Forge Town workable through the obligations of clerk of arrivals while managing the immediate pressure of furnace failure in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must absorb delayed maintenance, thin staffing, and practical strain before failure becomes public. Around Emberhollow Forge Town, that usually means carrying furnace failure, labor disputes, ash burial without letting the role of clerk of arrivals visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Talvek Ashvein can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.
Talvek Ashvein needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Emberhollow Forge Town.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Talvek Ashvein visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing. In Emberhollow Forge Town, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Forge Dedication Halls, Frontier Hammer Companies.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Emberhollow Forge Town: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
